name: Nuumonsters
short_description: Welcome to the wonderful *New* world of Nuumonsters! Play as Yana or Yasaka in a short and sweet adventure to become the strongest trainer in the Hana region!
detailed_description:
*Recently COMPLETELY Remade from scratch.... FREE UPDATE* !!

Nuumonsters is a game set in the future about curious little creatures that strive to be the strongest^^ Power on your AR Gear and play the role of Yasaka or Yana to become the highest ranking battler in the region!

Explore the quant and adorable "Hana" region, consisting of flavorful routes and towns. Defeat Elite Trainers to unlock new areas and continue on your journey. With 70+ monsters and countless moves, players have a lot of teambuilding options to indulge in as they level up their favorite monsters to take on enemy trainers with.

Nuumonsters is a short and sweet monster tamer, with it's art and charm being the main selling points. This game originally released 5 years ago and served as the solo developer "Yano"'s very first game.

This game was recently completely remade from scratch, though it's original simplicity was maintained mostly similar to the original. That said, the remake has produced a fully functional RPG with 70+ Monsters, though admittedly lacking in story.

If you are looking for a full JRPG experience with an in-depth or engaging story, please purchase at your own risk.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil
